columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: In terms of tumor volume, 263 patients (66.2%) in the combination arm... had high-volume disease. The value is 263 (66.2%).

columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | Low | Control
columns.extraction_plan: Not reported. The text on page 4 only provides the number and percentage of patients with high-volume disease in each arm. The number of patients with low-volume disease in the control arm is not explicitly stated. It could be calculated by subtracting the number of high-volume patients from the total number of patients in the control arm, but this is not explicitly reported.
